description: Style NoteIn the past, looking good meant compromising on your comfort, but now, jockey briefs for women aims to change all that. jockey uses a variety of extra comfy and stretchy fabrics to create the most fashionable women's underwear styles. You can be sure that when you wear panties from Jockey, you're choosing all-day comfort. Now, looking good can be comfortable too!Product DetailsBikini brief that is silky smooth with unique leg treatmentFalls just below the natural waistline with no panty line promiseThe feminine bikini cut flatters your figureFashionable ultra soft elastic that leaves no marks on your skinMaterial and CareElastane stretch fabricMachine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanFlat dry in shade
